name: DoubleUGames Co., Ltd.
summary: DoubleUGames Co., Ltd. develops games. The company offers W. Casino, a social casino game, as well as table games and slot machines. It also operates one source multiplatform, as well as offers PC and mobile games. The company operates in approximately 120 countries. DoubleUGames Co., Ltd. was founded in 2012 and is based in Seoul, South Korea.
